'''Imperial espionage droids''' were special [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]] manufactured by [[Cybot Galactica/Legends|Cybot Galactica]]. Designed to look and function like standard [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droids]], they were sold to individuals under investigations, where their special transmitters enabled them to relay important information to [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] units.

==History==
[[File:ImperialEspionageDroid-SWR.png|thumb|left|180px|An espionage droid.]]
One of the more notoriously known examples of espionage droid was the [[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries]] [[RA-7 protocol droid/Legends|RA-7 protocol droid]] in service aboard the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]].

In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], the protocol droid known as [[K-3PX]] stationed on [[Gamandar]] reported directly to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] on the actions of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Griggor Tower]], who had just launched a destructive attack on the planet [[Iskalon/Legends|Iskalon]]. K-3PX then led a contingent of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] into the detention block where the Admiral was interrogating the captured [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], and relieved Tower of his command, placing him under arrest. The stormtroopers obeyed K-3PX's orders without question or hesitation.
